title: Muskets Overhaul
description: An Overhaul for Ewewkek's Musketmod plus some new interesting Features & Mod Compatibility
body:
**the models and textures ARE NOT made by me!**

**Scarecrow01 is the original author, all the credits are to him! Check his profile** [here](https://www.curseforge.com/members/scarecrow01/projects)

**Mweed made the revolver model i included! Check his profile** [here](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mweed/projects)

_Both authors gave me the permissions to make this Resourcepack._
 

[Ewewkek's Musket Mod is required for this resourcepack to work!](https://modrinth.com/mod/musket-mod)

[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is required in order to use the Revolver model!


- **_What changes from the original models?_**
1. **The way the rifles diplays in your character's hands.**
2. **Backslot mod Compatible!** Now rifles and pistols display correctly when using the backslot mod.
3. **Itemphysics Compatible!** check the gallery
4. **Name dependent models!** try renaming the pistol "Revolver" using an Anvil _(this feature Requires CIT Resewn otherwise the model won't change)_. Someday i could add more models to rifles aswell.



[I also made a Resourcepack that revamps the armors!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-armors)
